_instructions: Fill out this template before running /seo-implement. All fields marked REQUIRED must be present. Optional fields can be omitted.
cms: REQUIRED: wordpress | shopify | webflow | framer | squarespace | custom

credentials._note: Store actual values in .env — reference them here by env var name

framer._note: Framer has no public write API — changes require manual Framer editor access or code overrides via custom domain

pages.id: REQUIRED: page ID (WP), page handle (Shopify), collection item ID (Webflow)
pages.name: Human readable name
pages.title_tag: Target title tag — keep under 60 chars
pages.meta_description: Target meta description — keep under 160 chars
pages.og_title: optional — defaults to title_tag if omitted
pages.og_description: optional — defaults to meta_description if omitted
pages.h1: Target H1 text — null if not changing
pages.h1_elementor_path: optional: e.g. [1][0][0] — only needed for Elementor pages
h2s: optional: list of H2 targets if restructuring headings

internal_links.context: optional: sentence context to locate the right instance

image_alts.image_url_contains: partial filename or URL fragment to identify image

remaining: List of tasks not yet implemented — updated after each run
